body.extend: { "file_type": "csv.gz", "sku_map": { "f9216": "德芙脆可可巧克力15g", "f9402": "M&M'S牛奶巧克力豆三角串包12.5g", "f9222": "德芙零糖黑巧38g", "f10504": "德芙坚果脆巴旦木牛巧海盐焦糖味50g", "f10505": "德芙坚果脆巴旦木牛巧提拉米苏味50g", "f10506": "彩虹糖吃定彩虹剥皮软糖 50g", "f10807": "益达脆皮软心无糖口香糖30粒酷爽薄荷味64g", "f10806": "益达脆皮软心无糖口香糖30粒芭乐冰茶味64g" }, "sku_cal_range": { "bysku2025_period": [ "f9216", "f9402", "f9222", "f10504", "f10505", "f10506", "f10807", "f10806" ] }, "sku_ttl_filter": { "y9216": ["Hyper", "Super"], "y9402": ["Hyper", "Super"], "y9222": ["Non KA MT", "TT"], "y10504": ["TT"], "y10505": ["TT"], "y10506": ["Hyper", "Super"], "y10807": ["TT"], "y10806": ["TT"] }, "sku_is_active": { "f9216": true, "f9402": true, "f9222": true, "f10504": true, "f10505": true, "f10506": true, "f10807": true, "f10806": true } }
body.summary: { "input": "processor input data description", "output": "processor output data description", "size": "e.g. number of rows", "duration": "duration of processing", "remark": "something..." }
